user.title: Connect to Contact Energy
user.description: Enter your Contact Energy account credentials to get started.

data_description.email: The email address you use to log into your Contact Energy account

select_account.title: Select Account
select_account.description: Multiple accounts were found. Please select which account you would like to monitor with this integration instance.

data_description.account_selection: Choose the property/account you want to monitor. You can add additional accounts by setting up separate integration instances.

configure_history.title: Configure Historical Data
configure_history.description: Choose how much historical usage data to download and store. This data will be available for charts and analysis in Home Assistant.

data_description.history_months: Number of months of past usage data to download (1-24 months). More data provides better long-term trends but takes longer to download initially.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Contact Energy. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please try again later.
error.no_accounts: No accounts found for this email address. Please check your credentials.
error.account_in_use: This account is already configured in Home Assistant. Please select a different account or remove the existing configuration first.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.no_accounts: No accounts found for this email address.

init.title: Update Integration Settings
init.description: Modify the historical data range for this account. Changing this will download any missing data.

data_description.history_months: Number of months of past usage data to store (1-24 months). Increasing this will download additional historical data. Decreasing it will not delete existing data.
